translations.introduction.0:
Hello stranger, welcome to TRACES.
I’ll be your companion memory
translations.introduction.1: I am the cosmic being handling all memories, and I need your help to gather new ones
translations.question.hint: use the joystick to choose the best matching artwork
translations.artwork.hint.explore: use the joystick to explore the artwork and other’s testimonies
translations.artwork.testimony: One testimony has already been left
translations.artwork.transcript-modal.title: Share your memory
translations.constellation.1: Look! You’re building your own constellation!
translations.constellation.3: You’re helping me so much, your constellation is beautiful!
translations.end.hint: Your data log is printing, take it!
translations.credits: TRACES is a pilot project being implemented as part of the Creativ’Up cross-border project
translations.session.quit.title: Leave the experience?
translations.session.quit.message: You will loose all your progress and go back to the home screen.
translations.session.quit.iddle.title: Still there?
translations.session.quit.iddle.message: You have been inactive for a while, you will be sent back to the home screen.
